title: IIT Jodhpur Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Fellow Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Technology Jodhpur (IIT Jodhpur) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancy for 01 Project Research Scientist post. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Mechanical Engineering, M.Sc. can apply for the IIT Jodhpur Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the ...
